stemHtml: METAR reports (1) _____ wind direction and over (2) _____; Control tower reports (3) _____ wind direction over (4) _____.

options.a: (1) True North; (2) 10 minutes; (3) Magnetic North; (4) 2 minutes.
options.b: (1) Magnetic North; (2) 2 minutes; (3) True North; (4) 10 minutes.
options.c: (1) True North; (2) 10 minutes; (3) Magnetic North; (4) 5 minutes.
options.d: (1) Magnetic North; (2) 10 minutes; (3) True North; (4) 2 minutes.
